title: MCA § 1-1-103 - Laws -- written or unwritten
text:
1-1-103. Laws -- written or unwritten. Laws, whether organic or ordinary, are either written or unwritten.

History: History: En. Sec. 3183, C. Civ. Proc. 1895; re-en. Sec. 7901, Rev. C. 1907; re-en. Sec. 10545, R.C.M. 1921; Cal. C. Civ. Proc. Sec. 1895; re-en. Sec. 10545, R.C.M. 1935; R.C.M. 1947, 93-1001-7.
